{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323173214E105C32D22123A3BCBA3"}"},"total":9768},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6827012047210070031","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这部书写的很精彩，写农民小青年，评自己学到医术发展自已的家乡面貌，带领大家发家自富，总的来说是一部好小说。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1589537611,"group_id":"6780226282312436750","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6n8UYF4W/kg0xkBM0beFSU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"75132218360","user_name":"稳稳当当的大畑裕之"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"75132218360","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6780226282312436750","book_info":{"abstract":"马小健的哥哥马大壮被人骗去东南亚，三年间杳无音信，再次收到消息时，他已被扣赌场，无法脱身。

嫂子胡桂兰得知此事气急攻心，晕倒在田埂上。

情急之下，马小健用出老神医传授给他的“天医九针”，全力将她救醒。

面对陷入绝境的家庭，年老无力的父母，柔弱无助的嫂子。

年仅十八岁却已习得一身高强本领的马小健，毅然决然的选择站出来。
